title: Any special releases in countries other than US CA and Japan
display_title: Any special releases in countries other than US CA and Japan
wikitext:
[]: Any special releases in countries other than US/CA and Japan             Quote Post by ILUVASUKALANGLEY » Tue Sep 17, 2013 7:09 pm was wondering if there are any special releases in other countries like in Europe or is the same??

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue Sep 17, 2013 8:25 pm What is a "special release"?

[]:             Quote Post by ILUVASUKALANGLEY » Tue Sep 17, 2013 9:01 pm i suppose I should have more clear. I was thinking of just special features, any bonus on the disc or external. Doesn't Evangelion 1.11 and 2.22 come in steelbooks for the German release? something like that. Are the release all plain and mundane?
